Class UpdateReservationRequest

java.lang.Object
messages.UpdateReservationRequest
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class UpdateReservationRequest extends Object implements Serializable
Represents a request to update an existing reservation in the system. This class carries the updated details such as date, time, number of guests, and status.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

    reservationID
    The unique identifier of the reservation to be updated.
    private LocalTime
    reservationTime
    The updated time for the reservation.
    private ReservationStatus
    status
    The updated status of the reservation (e.g., Confirmed, Cancelled).

    • UpdateReservationRequest

      public UpdateReservationRequest(int reservationID, LocalDate reservationDate, LocalTime reservationTime, int numOfGuests, ReservationStatus status)
      Constructs a new UpdateReservationRequest with the specified details. * @param reservationID the unique ID of the reservation
      Parameters:
      reservationDate - the new date for the reservation
      reservationTime - the new time for the reservation
      numOfGuests - the updated number of guests
      status - the updated ReservationStatus
